response:
Wade buys three sandwiches and two drinks, with the drinks costing $4 each. The total cost of the drinks is [4 * 2] = $8. If the total amount spent is $26, then the cost of the sandwiches is [26 - 8] = $18. Each sandwich costs [18 / 3] = $6.  

***  

The sandwiches each cost $6. The [total cost of the sandwiches] is [18], and the [total cost of the drinks] is [8]. The [total amount spent] is [26], and the [cost of each sandwich] is [6].  

Each beaker holds [14] mL of solution. The [total amount of solution] is [42], and the [number of beakers] is [3]. The [cost of each drink] is [4], and the [total cost of drinks] is [8]. The [total cost of sandwiches] is [18], and the [cost of each sandwich] is [6].
